(Spend 15M€, less 1M€ per Venus tag you have, to raise Venus 1 step.)
(max -5M€)

18
(Spend 18 M€ to place an ocean tile.)
Buffer Gas
16
(Spend 16 M€ to increase your TR 1 step. Solo games only.)
City
25
1
(Spend 25 M€ to place a city tile and increase your M€ production 1 step.)
Build Colony
17
(Spend 17 M€ to place a colony.)
Greenery
23
(Spend 23 M€ to place a greenery tile and raise oxygen 1 step.)
Power Plant
11
(Spend 11 M€ to increase your energy production 1 step.)
Sell Patents
X
x
(Discard any number of cards to gain that amount of M€.)
Asteroid
14
(Spend 14 M€ to raise the temperature 1 step.)

Global Events

Jovian Tax Rights
1
/
/
(Increase M€ production 1 step for each colony. Gain 1 titanium for each influence.)
Microgravity Health Problems
-3
/
(Lose 3 M€ for each colony (max 5, then reduced by influence).)
Cloud Societies
:
/
(Add a floater to each card that can collect floaters. Add 1 floater for each influence to a card.)
Corrosive Rain
OR
-10
/
(Lose 2 floaters from a card or 10 M€. Draw 1 card for each influence.)
Venus Infrastructure
2
/
(Gain 2 M€ per Venus tag (max 5) and influence.)
Sponsored Projects
:
/
(All cards with resources on them gain 1 resource. Draw 1 card for each influence.)
Asteroid Mining
/
(Gain 1 titanium for each Jovian tag (max 5) and influence.)
Generous Funding
2
/
5
over 15
(Gain 2 M€ for each influence and set of 5 TR over 15 (max 5 sets).)
Successful Organisms
/
(Gain 1 plant per plant production (max 5) and influence.)
Productivity
/
(Gain 1 steel for each steel production (max 5) and influence.)
Homeworld Support
2
/
(Gain 2 M€ for each Earth tag (max 5) and influence.)
Volcanic Eruptions
/
(Increase temperature 2 steps. Increase heat production 1 step per influence.)
Diversity
9
:
10
(Gain 10 M€ if you have 9 or more different tags. Influence counts as unique tags.)
Improved Energy Templates
/
(Increase energy production 1 step per 2 power tags (no limit). Influence counts as power tags.)
Interplanetary Trade
2
/
(Gain 2 M€ for each space tag (max 5) and influence.)
Celebrity Leaders
2
/
(Gain 2 M€ for each event played (max 5) and influence.)
Spin-Off Products
2
/
(Gain 2 M€ for each science tag (max 5) and influence.)
Election
:
1st:
2nd:
(Count your influence plus building tags and city tiles (no limits). The player with most (or 10 in solo) gains 2 TR, the 2nd (or 5 in solo) gains 1 TR (ties are friendly).)
Aquifer Released by Public Council
/
(First player places an ocean tile. Gain 1 plant and 1 steel per influence.)
Scientific Community
1
/
(Gain 1 M€ for each card in hand (no limit) and influence.)
Strong Society
2
/
(Gain 2 M€ for each city tile (max 5) and influence.)
Global Dust Storm
Lose all
-2
/
(Lose all heat. Lose 2 M€ for each building tag (max 5, then reduced by influence).)
Eco Sabotage
max 3
(Lose all plants except 3 + influence.)
Miners On Strike
/
(Lose 1 titanium for each Jovian tag (max 5, then reduced by influence).)
Mud Slides
4
/
(Lose 4 M€ for each tile adjacent to ocean (max 5, then reduced by influence).)
Revolution
:
1st:
2nd:
(Count Earth tags and ADD(!) influence. The player(s) with most (at least 1) loses 2 TR, and 2nd most (at least 1) loses 1 TR. SOLO: Lose 2 TR if the sum is 4 or more.)
Riots
4
/
(Lose 4 M€ for each city tile (max 5, then reduced by influence).)
Sabotage
/
(Decrease steel and energy production 1 step each. Gain 1 steel per influence.)
Snow Cover
/
(Decrease temperature 2 steps. Draw 1 card per influence.)
Pandemic
-3
/
(Lose 3 M€ for each building tag (max 5, then reduced by influence).)
War on Earth
4
(Reduce TR 4 steps. Each influence prevents 1 step.)
Paradigm Breakdown
2
/
(Discard 2 cards from hand. Gain 2 M€ per influence.)
Dry Deserts
/
(First player removes 1 ocean tile from the gameboard. Gain 1 standard resource per influence.)
Red Influence
-3
/
5
over 10
1
/
(Lose 3 M€ for each set of 5 TR over 10 (max 5 sets). Increase M€ production 1 step per influence.)
Solarnet Shutdown
3
/
(Lose 3 M€ for each blue card (max 5, then reduced by influence).)
Solar Flare
3
/
(Lose 3 M€ for each space tag (max 5, then reduced by influence).)

Milestones

Agronomist
Have 4 plant tags in play
Architect
Have 3 city tags in play
Briber
Pay 12 M€ to receive this milestone, in addition to the normal claim cost
Builder
Have 8 building tags in play
Builder
Have 7 building tags in play
C. Forester
Have 3 plant production
Capitalist
Have 64 M€
Coastguard
Own 3 tiles adjacent to oceans
Colonizer
Have 4 colonies
Diversifier
Have 8 different tags in play
Ecologist
Have 4 bio tags in play (plant, microbe and animal tags count as bio tags)
Economizer
Have 5 heat production
Energizer
Have 6 energy production
Engineer
Have a total of 10 energy and heat production
Farmer
Have 5 animal and microbe resources on your cards
Firestarter
Have 20 heat
Forester
Have 4 plant production
Fundraiser
Have 12 M€ production
Gambler
Fund 2 awards
Gardener
Own 3 greenery tiles
Generalist
Have increased all 6 productions by 1 step
Geologist
Own 3 tiles ON or ADJACENT to volcanic areas
Hoverlord
Have 7 floater resources on your cards
Hydrologist
Have placed 4 oceans.
Irrigator
Own 4 tiles adjacent to oceans
Land Specialist
Own 3 special (normally, brown) tiles
Landshaper
Have 1 city tile, 1 greenery and 1 special tile
Legend
Have 5 cards in your event pile
Legend
Have 4 cards in your event pile
Lobbyist
Having all 7 delegates in parties (Party Leaders and Chairman also count)
Mayor
Own 3 city tiles
Merchant
2 of each standard resource (after paying the claim cost)
Metallurgist
Have a total of 6 steel and titanium production
Minimalist
Have no more than 2 cards in hand
Philantropist
Have 5 cards with non-negative VP
Pioneer
Have 3 colonies
Pioneer
Have 3 colonies
Planetologist
Have 2 Earth tags, 2 Venus tags, and 2 Jovian tags
Planner
Have 16 cards in your hand
Polar Explorer
Own 3 tiles on the two bottom rows
Producer
Have a combined total production of at least 16
Researcher
Have 4 science tags in play
Rim Settler
Have 3 Jovian tags in play
Smith
Have a total of 6 steel and titanium production
Spacefarer
Have 6 space tags in play
Spacefarer
Have 4 space tags in play
Specialist
Have 10 in production of any resource
Sponsor
Have 3 cards that have cost of 20 M€ or more
T. Collector
Have 3 sets of automated (green), active (blue) and event (red) project cards in play
Tactician
Have 5 cards with requirements in play
Tactician
Have 4 cards with requirements in play
Terra Pioneer
Own 5 tiles on Mars
Terraformer
Have a terraform rating of 35 (or 26 with Turmoil.)
Terraformer
Have a terraform rating of 29
Terran
Have 6 Earth tags in play
Terran
Have 5 Earth tags in play
Thawer
Have raised the temperature 5 steps.
Trader
Have 3 different types of resources on cards
Tradesman
Have 3 different types of non-standard resources
Tropicalist
Own 3 tiles in the middle 3 equatorial rows
Tycoon
Have 15 project cards in play (not events.)
Tycoon
Have 10 blue and green cards in play.
V. Electrician
Have 4 power tags in play
V. Spacefarer
Have 4 space tags in play

Awards

A. Engineer
Have the most cards in play that directly alter your own production
A. Manufacturer
Have the most active (blue) project cards in play
A. Zoologist
Own the most animal and microbe resources
Administrator
Have the most cards with no tags
Banker
Have the most M€ production
Benefactor
Have the highest terraform rating
Biologist
Have the most animal, plant, and microbe tags in play
Blacksmith
Have the highest production of steel and titanium combined
Botanist
Have the most plant production
Celebrity
Have the most project cards in play with a base cost of at least 20 M€ (not events.)
Collector
Have the most different types of resources, both on your player board and on your cards.
Constructor
Have the most Colonies and Cities combined
Contractor
Have the most building tags in play
Cosmic Settler
Own the most cities not on Mars
Cultivator
Own the most greenery tiles
Curator
Have the most tags of any one type in play
Desert Settler
Own the most tiles south of the equator (the four bottom rows)
Edgedancer
Own the most tiles on the edges of the board
Electrician
Have the most power tags in play.
Estate Dealer
Own the most tiles adjacent to ocean tiles
Excentric
Have the most resources on cards in play
Forecaster
Have the most cards with requirements in play
Founder
Have the most tiles adjacent to special tiles.
Highlander
Own the most tiles that are NOT adjacent to ocean tiles
Incorporator
Have the most project cards in play with a base cost of at most 10 M€ (not events.)
Industrialist
Have most steel and energy
Investor
Have the most Earth tags in play
Landlord
Own the most tiles
Landscaper
Most tiles connected together (each player counts largest group of tiles)
Magnate
Have the most automated (green) project cards in play
Manufacturer
Have the highest production of steel and heat combined.
Metropolist
Own the most cities
Miner
Have the most steel and titanium
Mogul
Have the highest production (excluding M€) combined
Naturalist
Have the most plant and heat production
Politician
Have the most party leaders and influence combined.
Promoter
Have the most cards in your event pile
Scientist
Have the most science tags in play
Space Baron
Have the most space tags in play
Suburbian
Most tiles on areas along the edges of the map
T. Politician
Place the most delegates
Thermalist
Have the most heat
Tourist
Have the most empty spaces adjacent to your tiles
Traveller
Have the most Jovian and Earth tags in play combined
Urbanist
Have the most VP from city tile adjacencies on Mars
Venuphile
Have the most Venus tags in play
Visionary
Have the most cards in hand
Voyager
Have the most Jovian tags in play
Warmonger
Play the most cards that reduce other players' resources or production, INCLUDING EVENTS
Zoologist
Have the most animal resources
